name: Vouched
oneliner: Vouched builds the Know Your Agent (KYA) identity platform — Agent Checkpoint for AI agent identification and permissioning, Agent Detect for real-time agent detection, and Agent Govern via MCP-Identity.
finserv: Won 'Identity Verification Solution of the Year' at 2026 FinTech Breakthrough Awards. Core product expanded from human IDV to agent IDV with dedicated KYA suite. MCP-Identity integration positions at protocol layer.
team: Seattle-based. Series A led by Spring Rock Ventures, bringing total to $22M. KnowThat.ai community-driven agent trust directory adds network effects.
thesis: KYA is the regulatory vocabulary the thesis identifies as structurally equivalent to KYC — whoever defines the standard earliest has a SWIFT-like durable advantage. Vouched is the first pure-play KYA platform with fintech recognition and MCP integration. The risk is stage (Series A $17M is borderline) and whether human IDV origins make the agent pivot seem bolted-on rather than native.
